text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp ends in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun has worked extremely hard.

text_block_list.name: Bus Driver
text_block_list.text: We have arrived at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she worked so hard this summer, it only
feels fair to let her rest a little longer.
